positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and central composition of stylized botanical elements intertwined with celestial motifs. The main elements include lunar phases, creeping vines, glowing crescent moons, and whimsical stylized flora (like bioluminescent ferns and thistle). The style must be a hyper-detailed, blackwork engraving mixed with fine line art, achieving a strong, dramatic silhouette effect. Use deep indigo blues, forest greens, and soft metallic gold highlights against a clean negative space background. Intricate line work, perfect symmetry, high contrast, tattoo flash art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, messy, noise, amateur, watermark, logo, text, signature, poorly drawn hands, weird anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealism, sketch, gradient, low detail
